headlines.title: Iran War Updates: Tehran and U.S. Offer Conflicting Messages on State of Negotiations
headlines.summary: President Trump said his administration had had “very good talks” with Tehran in the last 24 hours. An Iranian official said an American plan to end the war was under review. Israel struck targets near Beirut.

headlines.title: Hantavirus Patients Land in Amsterdam With More Cruise Ship Evacuations Planned
headlines.summary: Three people with possible symptoms of the disease were evacuated on Wednesday morning from the MV Hondius before it headed to the Canary Islands.

headlines.title: World Cup Dynamic Ticket Pricing Drives Argentine Soccer Fans To Extremes
headlines.summary: Dynamic ticket pricing has made this year’s tournament the most expensive in history, pushing Argentine fans to extremes.

headlines.title: Iran’s Oil Sector and Economy Are Under Pressure as U.S. Blockade Bites
headlines.summary: Tehran says it can endure the pain, but its oil may soon have nowhere to go.

headlines.title: Reclaiming the Name of the Black Hero Who Inspired ‘Uncle Tom’s Cabin’
headlines.summary: After 42 years of slavery, Josiah Henson escaped to Canada, where he wrote a memoir, founded a school and led others to freedom. But his home long bore the name “Uncle Tom,” to the offense of many.

headlines.title: North Korea says it is not bound by any treaty on nuclear non-proliferation
Trump says Iran agreement ‘very possible’; Israeli forces bomb Beirut
Argentina investigates link to deadly hantavirus outbreak on cruise ship
In rare push, US lawmakers demand transparency on Israel nuclear capability

Secretary Howard Lutnick is questioned by House lawmakers over his Epstein ties
headlines.summary: Lutnick said last year that he cut ties with Epstein, his former neighbor, in 2005. But the Epstein files indicate that the two kept in contact, including for a 2012 lunch on Epstein's private island.

headlines.title: Antisemitism is a campaign issue in UK regional vote
headlines.summary: After a spate of attacks on Jews in Britain, politicians there are accusing each other of antisemitism ahead of local elections.

headlines.title: CNN Anchor Christiane Amanpour remembers Ted Turner
headlines.summary: NPR's Ailsa Chang speaks with CNN's Christiane Amanpour about broadcaster Ted Turner's legacy.

headlines.title: These companies help parents try to pick their babies' traits. Experts are wary
headlines.summary: Prospective parents can now pick embryos based on risk predictions for thousands of diseases and odds for specific traits. But should they?

headlines.title: Republicans want to add $1 billion for Trump's ballroom security to ICE funding plan
headlines.summary: Republicans in Congress are proposing $1 billion in funding for security for President Trump's White House ballroom as part of their partisan plan to fund Immigration and Customs Enforcement.

headlines.title: China ready to help restore peace, stability in Mideast
headlines.summary: Foreign Minister Wang Yi said on Wednesday that China is ready to help create the conditions for starting peace talks and play a greater role in restoring peace and stability in the Middle East, as the region stands at a critical juncture between war and peace.

headlines.title: President flexes control in primary state elections
headlines.summary: COLUMBUS, Indiana — Elections in the US states of Indiana, Michigan and Ohio on Tuesday made a picture increasingly clear — that President Donald Trump still dominates the Republican Party, and Democrats seem to have the momentum ahead of November's midterm elections.

headlines.title: Transition to EVs picks up pace in SE Asia amid concerns over surging oil prices
headlines.summary: Southeast Asia's motorists are expected to accelerate a shift toward electric vehicles amid mounting concerns over fuel costs, as global oil prices surge amid the Middle East conflict.

headlines.title: Small ball, wide door: Ping-Pong Diplomacy lives on
headlines.summary: Fifty-five years after United States table tennis players made a historic visit to China, the spirit of Ping-Pong Diplomacy continues to live on as people-to-people exchanges remain a cornerstone in bilateral relations.

headlines.title: Twin explosions in Punjab set off political slugfest
headlines.summary: Explosions near BSF headquarters in Jalandhar and Army Cantonment in Amritsar raise security concerns; investigations underway.

headlines.title: Suspected Pakistani boat found abandoned in creek off Kutch
headlines.summary: An abandoned boat suspected to be Pakistani was found in Kutch, prompting heightened security and ongoing investigations.

headlines.title: Rajya Sabha Opposition benches set to see many changes after Assembly poll results
headlines.summary: Rajya Sabha opposition benches will undergo significant changes post-Assembly polls, impacting multiple parties and benefiting Congress.

headlines.title: Gram Sabhas that gave nod to Nicobar project did not have mandatory 50% quorum
headlines.summary: Gram Sabhas approving the Nicobar project lacked the required 50% quorum, with attendance only between 1% and 12%.

headlines.title: Joint development of Rajasthan roads to improve connectivity of industrial areas
headlines.summary: RIICO and PWD collaborate to enhance Rajasthan's industrial road connectivity, developing 38 roads for improved transportation efficiency.
